  {
    "testCaseID": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_001",
    "title": "Positive Test - UE initiates Detach Request with Switch Off = true while camping on E-UTRAN",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN",
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE mode",
      "UE has valid NAS context and GUTI assigned",
      "UE has active PDN connections"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger UE to send NAS Detach Request message with parameters (GUTI, Switch Off = true) to the MME",
      "Verify that eNodeB forwards the NAS Detach Request message along with TAI+ECGI to the MME",
      "Verify that MME receives the Detach Request and triggers establishment of S1 connection if UE was in ECM-IDLE",
      "Verify security procedures are invoked if required to establish S1 connection",
      "Verify MME sends Delete Session Request messages per PDN connection to Serving GW including correct parameters (LBI, User Location Information, PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity active, Secondary RAT usage data if available, UE Time Zone if changed)",
      "Verify Serving GW responds with Delete Session Response and releases EPS Bearers accordingly",
      "Verify MME sends Detach Accept message to UE since detach is not due to switch off",
      "Verify MME sends S1 Release Command with Cause=Detach to eNodeB, including PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity active",
      "Verify eNodeB releases UE context and responds with S1 UE Context Release Complete message"
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME successfully processes UE-initiated Detach Request with Switch Off = true",
      "Proper session deletions and bearer deactivations occur",
      "S1 connection is released correctly",
      "UE receives Detach Accept message",
      "No errors or abnormal behavior occurs"
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture and decode NAS messages between UE and MME",
      "Network trace analysis of S1-AP messages between eNodeB and MME",
      "MME logs verification for Detach Request processing and session deletion",
      "Serving GW and PDN GW logs for Delete Session Requests and Responses",
      "UE logs for receipt of Detach Accept message"
    ],
    "category": ["Positive Testing", "Integration Testing"]
  },
